title: Negative Fps
description: this a another version of Fabulously Optimized that has more mods so it can give the max fps
body:
Negative FPS – Maximum Performance Boost

Negative FPS is a highly optimized modpack designed to significantly improve your game's performance, providing smoother gameplay and higher frame rates. Tested by countless players, this modpack is proven to deliver outstanding FPS boosts without compromising game quality. Whether you're on low-end hardware or looking to push your high-end rig to the limit, Negative FPS fine-tunes Minecraft for the best possible experience. this modpack includes carefully selected performance-enhancing mods to ensure a lag-free adventure. Say goodbye to stuttering and hello to blazing-fast speeds with Negative FPS!
